chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitutional Petition No.S-362 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Application in disposed of case. For hearing of CMA No. 263/2026 (C/A). 20.04.2026 Mr. Nazeer Hussain Ujjan, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Agha Athar Hussain, Assistant Advocate General Syed Sardar Ali Shah Rizvi, Additional Prosecutor General along with Qurban Ali Otho, DSP(Legal) on behalf of SSP Naushahro Feroze, Inspector Nissar Ahmed PS Moro, Inspector Shahid Jamro, SHO P.S Korai, Inspector Muhammad Ali Dharejo, SHO P.S Kamal Dero, Inspector Nisar, Dist: Naushahro Feroze, Inspector Mukhtiar Ali Dahar, P.S Malik...-..-...-..-..-..-..-..- Mr. Sajid Karim Khaki, Advocate, files vakalatnama on behalf of the alleged contemnors. In compliance with the earlier directions of this Court, reports have been submitted by the concerned police functionaries. Today, all of them have appeared and have unequivocally stated that they have neither committed any contempt of the orders of this Court nor had any intention to do so. They have further undertaken that, if required, protection shall be provided to the petitioner as and when necessary. In view of the above statement, learned counsel for the applicant submits that he is satisfied and does not press the instant contempt application, with the request that the police functionaries be directed to ensure provision of protection to the petitioner. It is observed that this Court has already passed directions in this regard, and the police functionaries are under a strict legal obligation to act in accordance with law and to refrain from committing any excess in the discharge of their official duties.

In view of the above statement, learned counsel for the applicant submits that he is satisfied and does not press the instant contempt application, with the request that the police functionaries be directed to ensure provision of protection to the petitioner. It is observed that this Court has already passed directions in this regard, and the police functionaries are under a strict legal obligation to act in accordance with law and to refrain from committing any excess in the discharge of their official duties. In view of the statements made and the assurance given, the instant contempt application, along with any pending applications, is hereby disposed of. JUDGE
